prompt: Minimalist app icon 1024x1024. Pure black background. A white ensō (zen circle) drawn as a single organic brushstroke. The opening/gap is in the upper right, and the gap is slightly wider than a typical ensō — giving it breathing room. At the upper right near the gap, a very small solid red dot — a recording indicator. The dot should be noticeably smaller than the previous version, more like a tiny subtle signal, not a prominent element. The ensō brushstroke is thick, organic, hand-painted, varies in thickness, confident, like the first concept A from the previous batch. White stroke, very small red dot upper right in the gap, black background. Nothing else. No text. No letters. The ensō should be similar in style to concept A — bold and fluid.
